# Frank De Graeve — Personal Website
# llms.txt · Machine-readable summary for AI search and crawlers
# Last updated: 2026-03-02
# Site: https://neatlittlemacapps.github.io/neatlittlemacapps-blog/

## About

Frank De Graeve is a DesignOps leader, UX strategist, and AI adoption advocate.
He helps teams build the conditions to scale design impact and AI fluency.
He also builds indie Mac apps under the Neat Little Mac Apps label.

## Professional positioning

I build systems, not screens.
Specialisms: DesignOps, UX Strategy, AI Adoption, Design Systems, Design Leadership.

- Homepage: /
- Blog (writing): /blog/
- Portfolio (selected work): /portfolio/
- CV (full career history): /cv/
- Contact: /contact/
